revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:September 1 (old lunar calendar)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of September 1 (old lunar calendar)]]</includeonly>

1 revision imported: importing jawiki history before translation, of all the 12 lunar months

revision.text:
{{旧暦9月}} '''旧暦9月1日'''（きゅうれきくがつついたち）は[[9月 (旧暦)|旧暦9月]]の1日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]]である。
== できごと == * [[明治]]4年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1871年]][[10月14日]]） - [[熊本洋学校]]が開校
== 誕生日 == * [[享保]]17年（グレゴリオ暦[[1732年]][[10月19日]]） - [[加藤暁台]]、[[俳人]]（+ [[1792年]]） * [[慶応]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1865年]][[10月20日]]） - [[石橋忍月]]、文芸評論家･小説家（+ [[1926年]]） * 慶応3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1867年]][[9月28日]]） - [[長野宇平治]]、[[建築家]]（+ [[1937年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[天文 (元号)|天文]]20年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1551年]][[9月30日]]） - [[大内義隆]]、[[大名]]（* [[1507年]]） * [[天正]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1573年]][[9月26日]]） - [[浅井長政]]、大名（* [[1545年]]） * 天正元年（ユリウス暦1573年9月26日） - [[浅井政元]]、[[武将]]、長政の弟（* [[1548年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|8|30|9|2|8|1|10|9|0901}} ※ただし、[[小の月]]の前日は[[8月29日 (旧暦)|8月29日]]。
[[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:9月1日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]]

[[sn:September 1 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 9월 1일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月1日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 1일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初一]] [[zh:九月初一]] [[en:draft:September 1 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar September}} '''September 1''' is the 1st day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}}4年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}}{{ill|1871|ja|1871年}}{{ill|October 14|ja|10月14日}}） - {{ill|Kumamoto Western School|ja|熊本洋学校|lt=Kumamoto Western School}}
== Births == * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}}17年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}}{{ill|1732|ja|1732年}}{{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日}}） - {{ill|Katō Akedai|ja|加藤暁台}}、{{ill|haiku poet|ja|俳人|lt=haiku poet}}（+ {{ill|1792|ja|1792年}}） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}}1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}}{{ill|1865|ja|1865年}}{{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日}}） - {{ill|Ishibashi Shingetsu|ja|石橋忍月}}、literary critic and novelist（文芸評論家･小説家）（+ {{ill|1926|ja|1926年}}） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}}3年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}}{{ill|1867|ja|1867年}}{{ill|September 28|ja|9月28日}}） - {{ill|Nagano Uheiji|ja|長野宇平治}}、{{ill|architect|ja|建築家}}（+ {{ill|1937|ja|1937年}}）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文 (元号)|lt=Tenmon|lt_ja=天文}}20年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}}{{ill|1551|ja|1551年}}{{ill|September 30|ja|9月30日}}） - {{ill|Ōuchi Yoshitaka|ja|大内義隆}}、{{ill|daimyo|ja|大名}}（* {{ill|1507|ja|1507年}}） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}}1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}}{{ill|1573|ja|1573年}}{{ill|September 26|ja|9月26日}}） - {{ill|Asai Nagamasa|ja|浅井長政}}、{{ill|daimyo|ja|大名}}（* {{ill|1545|ja|1545年}}） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}}1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}}1573年9月26日） - {{ill|Asai Masamoto|ja|浅井政元}}、{{ill|military commander|ja|武将|lt=military commander}}、Nagamasa's younger brother（長政の弟）（* {{ill|1548|ja|1548年}}）
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|8|30|9|2|8|1|10|9|0901}} [[Category:removing this]][[sn:8月29日 (旧暦)|8月29日]]。

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871年}} {{ill|October 14|ja|10月14日}} ） - {{ill|Kumamoto Western School|ja|熊本洋学校|lt=Kumamoto Western School}}
== Births == * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 17th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1732|ja|1732年}} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日}} ） - {{ill|Katō Akedai|ja|加藤暁台}} 、{{ill|haiku poet|ja|俳人|lt=haiku poet}} （+ {{ill|1792|ja|1792年}} ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1865|ja|1865年}} {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日}} ） - {{ill|Ishibashi Shingetsu|ja|石橋忍月}} 、literary critic and novelist（文芸評論家･小説家）（+ {{ill|1926|ja|1926年}} ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1867|ja|1867年}} {{ill|September 28|ja|9月28日}} ） - {{ill|Nagano Uheiji|ja|長野宇平治}} 、{{ill|architect|ja|建築家}} （+ {{ill|1937|ja|1937年}} ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文 (元号)|lt=Tenmon|lt_ja=天文}} 20th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1551|ja|1551年}} {{ill|September 30|ja|9月30日}} ） - {{ill|Ōuchi Yoshitaka|ja|大内義隆}} 、{{ill|daimyo|ja|大名}} （* {{ill|1507|ja|1507年}} ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1573|ja|1573年}} {{ill|September 26|ja|9月26日}} ） - {{ill|Asai Nagamasa|ja|浅井長政}} 、{{ill|daimyo|ja|大名}} （* {{ill|1545|ja|1545年}} ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} 1573年9月26日） - {{ill|Asai Masamoto|ja|浅井政元}} 、{{ill|military commander|ja|武将|lt=military commander}} 、Nagamasa's younger brother（長政の弟）（* {{ill|1548|ja|1548年}} ）

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871年}} {{ill|October 14|ja|10月14日}} ） - {{ill|Kumamoto Western School|ja|熊本洋学校|lt=Kumamoto Western School}}
== Births == * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 17th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1732|ja|1732年}} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日}} ） - {{ill|Katō Akedai|ja|加藤暁台}} 、{{ill|haiku poet|ja|俳人|lt=haiku poet}} （+ {{ill|1792|ja|1792年}} ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1865|ja|1865年}} {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日}} ） - {{ill|Ishibashi Shingetsu|ja|石橋忍月}} 、literary critic and novelist（文芸評論家･小説家）（+ {{ill|1926|ja|1926年}} ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1867|ja|1867年}} {{ill|September 28|ja|9月28日}} ） - {{ill|Nagano Uheiji|ja|長野宇平治}} 、{{ill|architect|ja|建築家}} （+ {{ill|1937|ja|1937年}} ）

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|" to "{{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|"
revision.text:
[[sn:September 1 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 1일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月1日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 1일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初一]] [[zh:九月初一]] [[en:draft:September 1 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 1''' is the 1st day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871年}} {{ill|October 14|ja|10月14日}} ） - {{ill|Kumamoto Western School|ja|熊本洋学校|lt=Kumamoto Western School}}
== Births == * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 17th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1732|ja|1732年}} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日}} ） - {{ill|Katō Akedai|ja|加藤暁台}} 、{{ill|haiku poet|ja|俳人|lt=haiku poet}} （+ {{ill|1792|ja|1792年}} ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1865|ja|1865年}} {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日}} ） - {{ill|Ishibashi Shingetsu|ja|石橋忍月}} 、literary critic and novelist（文芸評論家･小説家）（+ {{ill|1926|ja|1926年}} ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1867|ja|1867年}} {{ill|September 28|ja|9月28日}} ） - {{ill|Nagano Uheiji|ja|長野宇平治}} 、{{ill|architect|ja|建築家}} （+ {{ill|1937|ja|1937年}} ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文 (元号)|lt=Tenmon|lt_ja=天文}} 20th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1551|ja|1551年}} {{ill|September 30|ja|9月30日}} ） - {{ill|Ōuchi Yoshitaka|ja|大内義隆}} 、{{ill|daimyo|ja|大名}} （* {{ill|1507|ja|1507年}} ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1573|ja|1573年}} {{ill|September 26|ja|9月26日}} ） - {{ill|Asai Nagamasa|ja|浅井長政}} 、{{ill|daimyo|ja|大名}} （* {{ill|1545|ja|1545年}} ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} 1573年9月26日） - {{ill|Asai Masamoto|ja|浅井政元}} 、{{ill|military commander|ja|武将|lt=military commander}} 、Nagamasa's younger brother（長政の弟）（* {{ill|1548|ja|1548年}} ）
== See Also ==

[[sn:September 1 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 1일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月1日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 1일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初一]] [[zh:九月初一]] [[en:draft:September 1 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 1''' is the 1st day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871年}} {{ill|October 14|ja|10月14日}} ） - {{ill|Kumamoto Western School|ja|熊本洋学校|lt=Kumamoto Western School}}
== Births == * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 17th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1732|ja|1732年}} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日}} ） - {{ill|Katō Akedai|ja|加藤暁台}} 、{{ill|haiku poet|ja|俳人|lt=haiku poet}} （+ {{ill|1792|ja|1792年}} ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1865|ja|1865年}} {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日}} ） - {{ill|Ishibashi Shingetsu|ja|石橋忍月}} 、literary critic and novelist（文芸評論家･小説家）（+ {{ill|1926|ja|1926年}} ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1867|ja|1867年}} {{ill|September 28|ja|9月28日}} ） - {{ill|Nagano Uheiji|ja|長野宇平治}} 、{{ill|architect|ja|建築家}} （+ {{ill|1937|ja|1937年}} ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文 (元号)|lt=Tenmon|lt_ja=天文}} 20th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1551|ja|1551年}} {{ill|September 30|ja|9月30日}} ） - {{ill|Ōuchi Yoshitaka|ja|大内義隆}} 、{{ill|daimyo|ja|大名}} （* {{ill|1507|ja|1507年}} ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1573|ja|1573年}} {{ill|September 26|ja|9月26日}} ） - {{ill|Asai Nagamasa|ja|浅井長政}} 、{{ill|daimyo|ja|大名}} （* {{ill|1545|ja|1545年}} ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} 1573年9月26日） - {{ill|Asai Masamoto|ja|浅井政元}} 、{{ill|military commander|ja|武将|lt=military commander}} 、Nagamasa's younger brother（長政の弟）（* {{ill|1548|ja|1548年}} ）

[[sn:September 1 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 1일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月1日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 1일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初一]] [[zh:九月初一]] [[en:draft:September 1 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 1''' is the 1st day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871st year }} {{ill|October 14|ja|10月14日}} ） - {{ill|Kumamoto Western School|ja|熊本洋学校|lt=Kumamoto Western School}}
== Births == * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 17th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1732|ja|1732nd year }} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日}} ） - {{ill|Katō Akedai|ja|加藤暁台}} 、{{ill|haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|lt=haiku poet}} （+ {{ill|1792|ja|1792nd year }} ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1865|ja|1865th year }} {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日}} ） - {{ill|Ishibashi Shingetsu|ja|石橋忍月}} 、literary critic and novelist（文芸Critic･Novelist）（+ {{ill|1926|ja|1926年}} ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1867|ja|1867th year }} {{ill|September 28|ja|9月28日}} ） - {{ill|Nagano Uheiji|ja|長野宇平治}} 、{{ill|architect|ja|建築家}} （+ {{ill|1937|ja|1937th year }} ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文 (元号)|lt=Tenmon|lt_ja=天文}} 20th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1551|ja|1551st year }} {{ill|September 30|ja|9月30日}} ） - {{ill|Ōuchi Yoshitaka|ja|大内義隆}} 、{{ill|daimyo|ja|大名}} （* {{ill|1507|ja|1507th year }} ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1573|ja|1573rd year }} {{ill|September 26|ja|9月26日}} ） - {{ill|Asai Nagamasa|ja|浅井長政}} 、{{ill|daimyo|ja|大名}} （* {{ill|1545|ja|1545th year }} ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} 1573rd year 9月26日） - {{ill|Asai Masamoto|ja|浅井政元}} 、{{ill|military commander|ja|武将|lt=military commander}} 、Nagamasa's younger brother（長政の弟）（* {{ill|1548|ja|1548th year }} ）

[[sn:September 1 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 1일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月1日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 1일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初一]] [[zh:九月初一]] [[en:draft:September 1 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 1''' is the 1st day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871st year }} {{ill|October 14|ja|10月14日}} ） - {{ill|Kumamoto Western School|ja|熊本洋学校|lt=Kumamoto Western School}}
== Births == * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 17th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1732|ja|1732nd year }} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日}} ） - {{ill|Katō Akedai|ja|加藤暁台}} 、{{ill|haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|lt=haiku poet}} （+ {{ill|1792|ja|1792nd year }} ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1865|ja|1865th year }} {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日}} ） - {{ill|Ishibashi Shingetsu|ja|石橋忍月}} 、literary critic and novelist（文芸Critic･Novelist）（+ {{ill|1926|ja|1926年}} ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1867|ja|1867th year }} {{ill|September 28|ja|9月28日}} ） - {{ill|Nagano Uheiji|ja|長野宇平治}} 、{{ill|architect|ja|建築家}} （+ {{ill|1937|ja|1937th year }} ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文 (元号)|lt=Tenmon|lt_ja=天文}} 20th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1551|ja|1551st year }} {{ill|September 30|ja|9月30日}} ） - {{ill|Ōuchi Yoshitaka|ja|大内義隆}} 、{{ill|daimyo|ja|大名}} （* {{ill|1507|ja|1507th year }} ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1573|ja|1573rd year }} {{ill|September 26|ja|9月26日}} ） - {{ill|Asai Nagamasa|ja|浅井長政}} 、{{ill|daimyo|ja|大名}} （* {{ill|1545|ja|1545th year }} ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} 1573rd year 9月26日） - {{ill|Asai Masamoto|ja|浅井政元}} 、{{ill|military commander|ja|武将|lt=military commander}} 、Nagamasa's younger brother（長政の弟）（* {{ill|1548|ja|1548th year }} ）
== See Also ==

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.
revision.text:
[[cdo:9 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初一]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 1''' is the 1st day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871st year }} {{ill|October 14|ja|10月14日}} ） - {{ill|Kumamoto Western School|ja|熊本洋学校|lt=Kumamoto Western School}}
== Births == * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 17th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1732|ja|1732nd year }} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日}} ） - {{ill|Katō Akedai|ja|加藤暁台}} 、{{ill|haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|lt=haiku poet}} （+ {{ill|1792|ja|1792nd year }} ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1865|ja|1865th year }} {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日}} ） - {{ill|Ishibashi Shingetsu|ja|石橋忍月}} 、literary critic and novelist（文芸Critic･Novelist）（+ {{ill|1926|ja|1926年}} ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1867|ja|1867th year }} {{ill|September 28|ja|9月28日}} ） - {{ill|Nagano Uheiji|ja|長野宇平治}} 、{{ill|architect|ja|建築家}} （+ {{ill|1937|ja|1937th year }} ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文 (元号)|lt=Tenmon|lt_ja=天文}} 20th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1551|ja|1551st year }} {{ill|September 30|ja|9月30日}} ） - {{ill|Ōuchi Yoshitaka|ja|大内義隆}} 、{{ill|daimyo|ja|大名}} （* {{ill|1507|ja|1507th year }} ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1573|ja|1573rd year }} {{ill|September 26|ja|9月26日}} ） - {{ill|Asai Nagamasa|ja|浅井長政}} 、{{ill|daimyo|ja|大名}} （* {{ill|1545|ja|1545th year }} ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} 1573rd year 9月26日） - {{ill|Asai Masamoto|ja|浅井政元}} 、{{ill|military commander|ja|武将|lt=military commander}} 、Nagamasa's younger brother（長政の弟）（* {{ill|1548|ja|1548th year }} ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|8|30|9|2|8|1|10|9|0901}} 。
[[cdo:9 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初一]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初一]]

== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenmon (era)|ja|天文 (元号)|lt=Tenmon|lt_ja=天文|12=draft|12=draft}} 20th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1551|ja|1551st year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|September 30|ja|9月30日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） - {{ill|Ōuchi Yoshitaka|ja|大内義隆|12=draft|12=draft}} 、{{ill|daimyo|ja|大名|12=draft|12=draft}} （* {{ill|1507|ja|1507th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1573|ja|1573rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|September 26|ja|9月26日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） - {{ill|Asai Nagamasa|ja|浅井長政|12=draft|12=draft}} 、{{ill|daimyo|ja|大名|12=draft|12=draft}} （* {{ill|1545|ja|1545th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ） * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} 1573rd year 9月26日） - {{ill|Asai Masamoto|ja|浅井政元|12=draft|12=draft}} 、{{ill|military commander|ja|武将|lt=military commander|12=draft|12=draft}} 、Nagamasa's younger brother（長政の弟）（* {{ill|1548|ja|1548th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ）

== Births == * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 17th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1732|1732]] [[:en:October 19|October 19]] ） - {{ill|Katō Akedai|ja|加藤暁台|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katō Akedai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 久村暁台|1=Kyōtai Katō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30398138}} 、{{ill|haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|1=Haiku poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|1=Haiku Poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|WD=Q135490197|lt=haiku poet|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/haiku poet|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} （+ [[:en:1792|1792]] ） * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] [[:en:October 20|October 20]] ） - [[:en:Ishibashi Ningetsu|Ishibashi Shingetsu]] 、literary critic and novelist（文芸Critic･Novelist）（+ [[:en:1926|1926]] ） * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:September 28|September 28]] ） - {{ill|Nagano Uheiji|ja|長野宇平治|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagano Uheiji|1=Uheiji Nagano|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11654164}} 、[[:en:Architect|architect]] （+ [[:en:1937|1937]] ）
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenbun|Tenmon]] 20th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1551|1551]] [[:en:September 30|September 30]] ） - [[:en:Ōuchi Yoshitaka|Ōuchi Yoshitaka]] 、[[:en:Daimyo|daimyo]] （* [[:en:1507|1507]] ） * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1573|1573]] [[:en:September 26|September 26]] ） - [[:en:Azai Nagamasa|Asai Nagamasa]] 、[[:en:Daimyo|daimyo]] （* [[:en:1545|1545]] ） * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] 1573rd year 9月26日） - {{ill|Asai Masamoto|ja|浅井政元|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asai Masamoto|1=Azai Masamoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11556941}} 、{{ill|military commander|ja|武将|lt=military commander|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/military commander|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} 、Nagamasa's younger brother（長政の弟）（* [[:en:1548|1548]] ）

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月1日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 1일]][[zh-classical:九月初一]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月初一]][[zh:九月初一]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840137]] Wikidata name: 1st day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:13, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 1|qq=September 1}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 1일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 1''' is the 1st day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events == * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:October 14|October 14]] ） - {{ill|Kumamoto Western School|ja|熊本洋学校|lt=Kumamoto Western School|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumamoto Western School|1=Kumamoto Yogakko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11568202}}
== Births == * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 17th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1732|1732]] [[:en:October 19|October 19]] ） - {{ill|Katō Akedai|ja|加藤暁台|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katō Akedai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 久村暁台|1=Kyōtai Katō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30398138}} 、{{ill|haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|1=Haiku poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|1=Haiku Poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|WD=Q135490197|lt=haiku poet|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/haiku poet|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} （+ [[:en:1792|1792]] ） * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] [[:en:October 20|October 20]] ） - [[:en:Ishibashi Ningetsu|Ishibashi Shingetsu]] 、literary critic and novelist（文芸Critic･Novelist）（+ [[:en:1926|1926]] ） * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:September 28|September 28]] ） - {{ill|Nagano Uheiji|ja|長野宇平治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagano Uheiji|1=Uheiji Nagano|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11654164}} 、[[:en:Architect|architect]] （+ [[:en:1937|1937]] ）
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenbun|Tenmon]] 20th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1551|1551]] [[:en:September 30|September 30]] ） - [[:en:Ōuchi Yoshitaka|Ōuchi Yoshitaka]] 、[[:en:Daimyo|daimyo]] （* [[:en:1507|1507]] ） * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1573|1573]] [[:en:September 26|September 26]] ） - [[:en:Azai Nagamasa|Asai Nagamasa]] 、[[:en:Daimyo|daimyo]] （* [[:en:1545|1545]] ） * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] 1573rd year 9月26日） - {{ill|Asai Masamoto|ja|浅井政元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asai Masamoto|1=Azai Masamoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11556941}} 、{{ill|military commander|ja|武将|lt=military commander|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/military commander|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} 、Nagamasa's younger brother（長政の弟）（* [[:en:1548|1548]] ）

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events == * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:October 14|October 14]] ） - {{ill|Kumamoto Western School|ja|熊本洋学校|lt=Kumamoto Western School|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumamoto Western School|1=Kumamoto Yogakko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11568202}}
== Births == * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 17th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1732|1732]] [[:en:October 19|October 19]] ） - {{ill|Katō Akedai|ja|加藤暁台|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katō Akedai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 久村暁台|1=Kyōtai Katō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30398138}} 、{{ill|haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|1=Haiku poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|1=Haiku Poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|WD=Q135490197|lt=haiku poet|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/haiku poet|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} （+ [[:en:1792|1792]] ） * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] [[:en:October 20|October 20]] ） - [[:en:Ishibashi Ningetsu|Ishibashi Shingetsu]] 、literary critic and novelist（文芸Critic･Novelist）（+ [[:en:1926|1926]] ） * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:September 28|September 28]] ） - {{ill|Nagano Uheiji|ja|長野宇平治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagano Uheiji|1=Uheiji Nagano|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11654164}} 、[[:en:Architect|architect]] （+ [[:en:1937|1937]] ）
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenbun|Tenmon]] 20th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1551|1551]] [[:en:September 30|September 30]] ） - [[:en:Ōuchi Yoshitaka|Ōuchi Yoshitaka]] 、[[:en:Daimyo|daimyo]] （* [[:en:1507|1507]] ） * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1573|1573]] [[:en:September 26|September 26]] ） - [[:en:Azai Nagamasa|Asai Nagamasa]] 、[[:en:Daimyo|daimyo]] （* [[:en:1545|1545]] ） * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] 1573rd year 9月26日） - {{ill|Asai Masamoto|ja|浅井政元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asai Masamoto|1=Azai Masamoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11556941}} 、{{ill|military commander|ja|武将|lt=military commander|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/military commander|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} 、Nagamasa's younger brother（長政の弟）（* [[:en:1548|1548]] ）

== Births == * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 17th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1732|1732]] [[:en:October 19|October 19]] ） - {{ill|Katō Akedai|ja|加藤暁台|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katō Akedai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 久村暁台|1=Kyōtai Katō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30398138}} 、{{ill|haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|1=Haiku poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|1=Haiku Poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|WD=Q135490197|lt=haiku poet|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/haiku poet|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} （+ [[:en:1792|1792]] ） * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] [[:en:October 20|October 20]] ） - [[:en:Ishibashi Ningetsu|Ishibashi Shingetsu]] 、literary critic and novelist（文芸Critic･Novelist）（+ [[:en:1926|1926]] ） * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1867|1867]] [[:en:September 28|September 28]] ） - {{ill|Nagano Uheiji|ja|長野宇平治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagano Uheiji|1=Uheiji Nagano|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11654164}} 、[[:en:Architect|architect]] （+ [[:en:1937|1937]] ）
== Deaths == * [[:en:Tenbun|Tenmon]] 20th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1551|1551]] [[:en:September 30|September 30]] ） - [[:en:Ōuchi Yoshitaka|Ōuchi Yoshitaka]] 、[[:en:Daimyo|daimyo]] （* [[:en:1507|1507]] ） * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1573|1573]] [[:en:September 26|September 26]] ） - [[:en:Azai Nagamasa|Asai Nagamasa]] 、[[:en:Daimyo|daimyo]] （* [[:en:1545|1545]] ） * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] 1573rd year 9月26日） - {{ill|Asai Masamoto|ja|浅井政元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asai Masamoto|1=Azai Masamoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11556941}} 、{{ill|military commander|ja|武将|lt=military commander|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/military commander|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} 、Nagamasa's younger brother（長政の弟）（* [[:en:1548|1548]] ）

== Births == * {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|WD=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō}} 17th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1732|en|1732|WD=Q6966|lt=1732}} {{ill|October 19|en|October 19|WD=Q2961|lt=October 19}} ） - {{ill|Katō Akedai|ja|加藤暁台|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katō Akedai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 久村暁台|1=Kyōtai Katō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30398138}} 、{{ill|haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|1=Haiku poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|1=Haiku Poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|WD=Q135490197|lt=haiku poet|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/haiku poet|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} （+ {{ill|1792|en|1792|WD=Q7805|lt=1792}} ） * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|WD=Q776775|lt=Keiō}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1865|en|1865|WD=Q7708|lt=1865}} {{ill|October 20|en|October 20|WD=Q2959|lt=October 20}} ） - {{ill|Ishibashi Ningetsu|en|Ishibashi Ningetsu|WD=Q551262|lt=Ishibashi Shingetsu}} 、literary critic and novelist（文芸Critic･Novelist）（+ {{ill|1926|en|1926|WD=Q5259|lt=1926}} ） * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|WD=Q776775|lt=Keiō}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1867|en|1867|WD=Q7715|lt=1867}} {{ill|September 28|en|September 28|WD=Q2883|lt=September 28}} ） - {{ill|Nagano Uheiji|ja|長野宇平治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagano Uheiji|1=Uheiji Nagano|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11654164}} 、{{ill|Architect|en|Architect|WD=Q42973|lt=architect}} （+ {{ill|1937|en|1937|WD=Q18647|lt=1937}} ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenbun|en|Tenbun|WD=Q1192853|lt=Tenmon}} 20th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1551|en|1551|WD=Q6560|lt=1551}} {{ill|September 30|en|September 30|WD=Q2881|lt=September 30}} ） - {{ill|Ōuchi Yoshitaka|en|Ōuchi Yoshitaka|WD=Q1065163|lt=Ōuchi Yoshitaka}} 、{{ill|Daimyo|en|Daimyo|WD=Q61982|lt=daimyo}} （* {{ill|1507|en|1507|WD=Q6161|lt=1507}} ） * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1573|en|1573|WD=Q6678|lt=1573}} {{ill|September 26|en|September 26|WD=Q2885|lt=September 26}} ） - {{ill|Azai Nagamasa|en|Azai Nagamasa|WD=Q1142446|lt=Asai Nagamasa}} 、{{ill|Daimyo|en|Daimyo|WD=Q61982|lt=daimyo}} （* {{ill|1545|en|1545|WD=Q6531|lt=1545}} ） * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} 1573rd year 9月26日） - {{ill|Asai Masamoto|ja|浅井政元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asai Masamoto|1=Azai Masamoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11556941}} 、{{ill|military commander|ja|武将|lt=military commander|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/military commander|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} 、Nagamasa's younger brother（長政の弟）（* {{ill|1548|en|1548|WD=Q6551|lt=1548}} ）

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 1일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 1''' is the 1st day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events == * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1871|en|1871|WD=Q7746|lt=1871}} {{ill|October 14|en|October 14|WD=Q2922|lt=October 14}} ） - {{ill|Kumamoto Western School|ja|熊本洋学校|lt=Kumamoto Western School|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumamoto Western School|1=Kumamoto Yogakko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11568202}}

== Births == * {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|WD=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō|1=Kyōhō}} 17th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1732|en|1732|WD=Q6966|lt=1732|1=1732}} {{ill|October 19|en|October 19|WD=Q2961|lt=October 19|1=October 19}} ） - {{ill|Katō Akedai|ja|加藤暁台|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katō Akedai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 久村暁台|1=Kyōtai Katō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q30398138}} 、{{ill|haiku poet|ja|Haiku Poet|1=haiku poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|1=Haiku Poet|2=ja|3=俳句詩人|WD=Q135490197|lt=haiku poet|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/haiku poet|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} （+ {{ill|1792|en|1792|WD=Q7805|lt=1792|1=1792}} ） * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|WD=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1865|en|1865|WD=Q7708|lt=1865|1=1865}} {{ill|October 20|en|October 20|WD=Q2959|lt=October 20|1=October 20}} ） - {{ill|Ishibashi Ningetsu|en|Ishibashi Ningetsu|WD=Q551262|lt=Ishibashi Shingetsu|1=Ishibashi Ningetsu}} 、literary critic and novelist（文芸Critic･Novelist）（+ {{ill|1926|en|1926|WD=Q5259|lt=1926|1=1926}} ） * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|WD=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1867|en|1867|WD=Q7715|lt=1867|1=1867}} {{ill|September 28|en|September 28|WD=Q2883|lt=September 28|1=September 28}} ） - {{ill|Nagano Uheiji|ja|長野宇平治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagano Uheiji|1=Uheiji Nagano|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11654164}} 、{{ill|Architect|en|Architect|WD=Q42973|lt=architect|1=Architect}} （+ {{ill|1937|en|1937|WD=Q18647|lt=1937|1=1937}} ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tenbun|en|Tenbun|WD=Q1192853|lt=Tenmon|1=Tenbun}} 20th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1551|en|1551|WD=Q6560|lt=1551|1=1551}} {{ill|September 30|en|September 30|WD=Q2881|lt=September 30|1=September 30}} ） - {{ill|Ōuchi Yoshitaka|en|Ōuchi Yoshitaka|WD=Q1065163|lt=Ōuchi Yoshitaka|1=Ōuchi Yoshitaka}} 、{{ill|Daimyo|en|Daimyo|WD=Q61982|lt=daimyo|1=Daimyo}} （* {{ill|1507|en|1507|WD=Q6161|lt=1507|1=1507}} ） * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1573|en|1573|WD=Q6678|lt=1573|1=1573}} {{ill|September 26|en|September 26|WD=Q2885|lt=September 26|1=September 26}} ） - {{ill|Azai Nagamasa|en|Azai Nagamasa|WD=Q1142446|lt=Asai Nagamasa|1=Azai Nagamasa}} 、{{ill|Daimyo|en|Daimyo|WD=Q61982|lt=daimyo|1=Daimyo}} （* {{ill|1545|en|1545|WD=Q6531|lt=1545|1=1545}} ） * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} 1573rd year 9月26日） - {{ill|Asai Masamoto|ja|浅井政元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asai Masamoto|1=Azai Masamoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11556941}} 、{{ill|military commander|ja|武将|lt=military commander|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/military commander|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11545923}} 、Nagamasa's younger brother（長政の弟）（* {{ill|1548|en|1548|WD=Q6551|lt=1548|1=1548}} ）
